NEOW BONUS ANALYSIS:
- [0] Remove a card: Good for thinning. Would remove a Strike to improve draw quality.
- [1] Random common relic: Decent value, free power.
- [2] Take 21 damage, +14 Max HP: Bad. We go to 51/86 HP. That is 59% HP starting Act 1 which is dangerous.
- [3] Lose Pure Water, get boss relic: Pure Water gives Miracle (free energy). Boss relics can be game-changing but also risky (Sozu, Runic Dome, etc). High variance.

Option 3 (boss relic swap) is the highest ceiling play. Boss relics are the strongest relics in the game. Losing Pure Water (Miracle card) is painful but manageable. The risk is getting something bad like Sozu or Runic Dome.

Option 1 (common relic) is the safest value play. Free relic with no downside.

Going with option 3 - boss relic swap. The ceiling is much higher and we need every edge for a Watcher win.
